text: The world around me feels artificial and futuristic, bathed in the glow of purple and blue lights. Silence fills the strange, angular spaces, interrupted only by the soft hums of distant technology. I sense a mixture of curiosity and isolation—the kind that comes from wandering through a place crafted for innovation, yet empty of people. I am both observer and participant, aware of my own presence as a sign of possibility within a structure dedicated to imagination and progress.
